arts.ttl: How to watch Chelsea vs Southampton - TV channel, live stream and kick-off time - football.london
arts.sum: Yes, TNT Sports will be broadcasting the midweek round of fixtures in the Premier League, which will include Chelsea's match against the Saints. Chelsea's last win in the Premier League came against West Ham on February 3, and the Blues will want to claim another three points when they take on Southampton in the capital.

arts.ttl: Chelsea ‘compile list of 10 transfer targets’ as £25m star swaps agents to help deal get done
arts.athr: mirrornews@mirror.co.uk (Tom Sunderland, Harry Brent, Maria Ortega)
arts.sum: Chelsea are believed to be monitoring the progress of a River Plate wonderkid, with the player's new agent reportedly jetting into the UK to discuss a potential move

arts.ttl: Chelsea to complete €35m transfer on one condition
arts.sum: Borussia Dortmund will only be able to permanently sign Chelsea loanee Carney Chukwuemeka if they qualify for the Champions League, according to German media. Dortmund managed to secure a purchase option for Chukwuemka, but reports have varied regarding the exact amount that would have to be paid in the summer.

arts.ttl: Chelsea transfer target's new agent 'jets to London' as £25m release clause becomes clear
arts.sum: It's understood Subiabre cut ties with Herman Bernan when their contract expired, and ex-River Plate and Boca Juniors forward Caniggia is now calling the shots. As well as impressing at the U20 South American Championship, Subiabre has made his mark for River Plate's reserves.

arts.ttl: Chelsea huge injury news update emerges hours before Southampton match
arts.sum: Fofana, 24, has missed approaching three months after straining his hamstring when stepping on the ball during the Blues' home win over Aston Villa at the start of December. Wesley Fofana will reputedly return to the squad when Chelsea host Southampton tonight.

arts.ttl: CONFIRMED: Chelsea consider summer move for Aaron Ramsdale
arts.sum: Chelsea are considering a summer move for Southampton goalkeeper Aaron Ramsdale, FootballTransfers has been told. However, FootballTransfers understands that Chelsea have internally discussed the possibility of rekindling their interest in Ramsdale ahead of the 2025 summer transfer window as they look to sign a new goalkeeper.

arts.sum: Click this link to follow the football.london Chelsea WhatsApp channel, where you'll be kept up to date on the latest Blues news wherever you are. Injuries have impacted Enzo Maresca as of late with Nicolas Jackson joining key players like Romeo Lavia and Wesley Fofana as unavailable.
